generated_by: scripts/regen-main-flows.py — source-of-truth maintained here, NOT in HTML

flows.name: Log a round
flows.primary_user_goal: Member captures a round in progress or after play, sees handicap update on Home.

steps.label: Open Home
steps.description: Member lands on HQ Home (home.js) after auth; League Pulse + active-round override render from current league context.

steps.label: Tap 'Log a round'
steps.description: Router.go('playnow') routes to src/pages/playnow.js. Form scaffolds via renderLogHoleGrid() (rounds.js:369).

steps.label: Course lookup
steps.description: PB.getCourseByName(name) hits in-memory cache (data.js:285); on miss, route to searchCourses fn.

steps.label: Submit round
steps.description: _submitRoundEntry(formData) writes round doc with score, holeScores[], firData, girData, puttsData, etc. Timestamp = date_noon_local (B.44).

steps.label: Handicap recompute
steps.description: Round write triggers handicap recompute via WHS calc in src/core/handicap.js; members doc updated with new differential.

steps.label: Home reflects new handicap
steps.description: Home re-renders on next visit (Router.go('home')) showing updated handicap + last-round summary.

steps.label: Static serve via GH Pages
steps.description: All client surfaces serve from alrightlad.github.io/smoky-mountain-open per deploy.yml workflow.

flows.name: View League Pulse / leaderboard
flows.primary_user_goal: Member sees recent league activity, hot streaks, and standings.

steps.label: Open Home
steps.description: Home renders League Pulse band above the fold (home.js:1842+).

steps.label: Pulse pulls rounds
steps.description: PB.getRounds() returns recent rounds, filtered by activeLeague leagueId field (per CLAUDE.md league-scoping rules).

steps.label: Resolves player names
steps.description: fbMemberCache populated at auth; rounds[].player resolves via PB.getPlayer(uid).

steps.label: Tap pulse card
steps.description: Pulse card click → Router.go('feed') for full activity stream.

steps.label: Tap leagues
steps.description: Bottom nav 'Leagues' → src/pages/leagues.js; standings table renders.

steps.label: Read standings
steps.description: Leagues page reads league.memberUids[] + computes per-member season points.

flows.name: Find a player + add as friend
flows.primary_user_goal: Member discovers another PARBAUGHS member, sends friend request, builds cross-league social graph.

steps.label: Open Members
steps.description: Router.go('members') loads src/pages/members.js — A-Z directory with public profiles.

steps.label: Read member rows
steps.description: Members page queries members collection filtered by privacy=public OR friend-of-current-user.

steps.label: Send friend request
steps.description: Tap CTA → write friend-request doc; recipient's members doc gets pending friend entry (W1.S3 redesigns this).

steps.label: Notification queued
steps.description: Recipient gets a notifications entry; pendingPush doc enqueues a push.

steps.label: sendPushNotification fires
steps.description: Cloud Function onCreate(pendingPush) reads recipient's fcmToken and dispatches FCM payload.

steps.label: Deliver to FCM
steps.description: FCM admin SDK ships the payload; pendingPush doc deleted post-send.

flows.name: Post + settle a ParCoin wager
flows.primary_user_goal: Member challenges another member for stakes; coins escrow, round plays, winner takes both.

steps.label: Open Wagers
steps.description: Router.go('wagers') → src/pages/wagers.js; current league's open wagers list.

steps.label: Compose wager
steps.description: Member fills opponent + stakes + terms; writes pending wager doc to bounties collection.

steps.label: Escrow coins (on accept)
steps.description: Opponent accept triggers parcoin_transactions entries: BOTH players' balances debited; wager flagged escrowed.

steps.label: Play the round
steps.description: Both players log a round (F1) for the stakes course.

steps.label: Round outcome
steps.description: Submitted rounds resolve the wager (lower score wins, etc. — settlement logic per W1.S6 spec).

steps.label: Settle winnings
steps.description: Winner's balance credited 2× stakes; loser's already-debited; ledger entry on both sides.

steps.label: Notification + Home update
steps.description: Wager outcome notification fires; Home reflects new balance + W/L record.

flows.name: Book or RSVP to a tee time
flows.primary_user_goal: Member posts a tee time or RSVPs to a peer's posted slot.

steps.label: Open Calendar / Tee
steps.description: src/pages/calendar.js + teetimes.js; upcoming slots render with RSVP CTAs.

steps.label: Post tee time
steps.description: writeTeeTime(date, course, openings) → teetimes collection doc with leagueId scope.

steps.label: Surfaces in feed
steps.description: Feed activity stream picks up tee time event card; visible to league members.

steps.label: RSVP click
steps.description: Other member taps RSVP → tee time doc's rsvps[] array updated.

steps.label: Host notified of fill
steps.description: When openings_count reaches threshold, host gets a notifications entry + ParCoin reward (15 coins per CLAUDE.md economy).

steps.label: Push fires
steps.description: Standard send-push path (same as F3 step 5).

flows.name: Earn an achievement / see Trophy Room update
flows.primary_user_goal: Member crosses a milestone (PB, season champ, range streak); celebration toast + Trophy Room entry.

steps.label: Trigger action
steps.description: Member completes round / range session / wager — any can trigger an achievement check.

steps.label: Submit triggers check
steps.description: On round submit, achievement engine evaluates against earned vs unearned. PB detection: this round's score < member.personalBest18.

steps.label: ParCoin reward
steps.description: Achievement unlock → parcoin_transactions credit per CLAUDE.md economy table (100 for 18H PB, 50 for 9H PB).

steps.label: Toast + Trophy Room
steps.description: Toast renders inline (ach-celebrate keyframe, respecting prefers-reduced-motion per v8.1.3). Trophy Room (trophyroom.js) gains the new entry on next visit.

steps.label: Achievement state
steps.description: Some achievement data lives in members.achievements[] or pending_celebrations collection for cross-device sync.

flows.name: Range session log
flows.primary_user_goal: Member logs a practice session with drill focus + feel rating; aggregates render on Range page.

steps.label: Tap 'Log range'
steps.description: Home CTA → Router.go('range') → src/pages/range.js.

steps.label: Start session timer
steps.description: Range session timer (start/pause/stop) + drill tags + feel rating (1-5).

steps.label: Submit session
steps.description: Range session doc written (separate from rounds — uses syncrounds or rangelive collection per page mode).

steps.label: Reward if ≥30 min
steps.description: If session duration ≥ 30 min, ParCoin reward (10 coins) per CLAUDE.md economy.

steps.label: Surfaces in feed
steps.description: Activity feed picks up the session as a feed entry, visible to league members.

flows.name: Spectator + Caddy verify
flows.primary_user_goal: Member (or friend cross-league) watches a live round, Caddy surfaces insights, replay survives after round closes.

steps.label: See live-round card
steps.description: Feed surfaces an in-progress round; live-now indicator visible (per W1.S3 member detail line spec).

steps.label: Tap to spectate
steps.description: Router.go('spectator?roundId=X') → src/pages/spectator.js; Spectator HUD overlays score + hole + last shot.

steps.label: Subscribe to liverounds
steps.description: Spectator subscribes to liverounds collection updates for the specific round; hole-by-hole updates stream.

steps.label: Caddy insight
steps.description: AI Caddie (rule-based for non-Pro, Anthropic-backed for Pro per Phase 4) surfaces per-hole context. Currently rule-based via src/core/caddie.js.

steps.label: Round closes
steps.description: Player's _submitRoundEntry completes the round; spectator's view transitions to final card; optional 'watched X play Y' social action recorded.
